message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[\"union\", 1, 2, 0, 5], [\"attributes\", 2, 2, 1, null], [\"find\", 3, 4, 1, null], [\"branch\", null, null, 1, null], [\"union\", 3, 4, 2, 7], [\"merge_versions\", null, null, 1, 3], [\"find\", 1, 4, 4, null], [\"attributes\", 1, 4, 4, null]]"],"focus":"attributes when a==b, disconnected queries, branching then merging disjoint components"},{"input_lines":["[[\"union\", 1, 2, 0, 5], [\"branch\", null, null, 1, null], [\"union\", 2, 3, 2, -2], [\"merge_versions\", null, null, 1, 3], [\"find\", 2, 3, 3, null], [\"find\", 2, 3, 1, null]]"],"focus":"merge failure due to negative-capacity edge and verifying original versions unchanged"},{"input_lines":["[[\"union\", 100000, 200000, 0, 10], [\"union\", 200000, 300000, 1, 20], [\"union\", 300000, 400000, 2, 30], [\"attributes\", 100000, 400000, 3, null], [\"split\", 200000, 300000, 3, null], [\"find\", 100000, 400000, 4, null], [\"find\", 100000, 400000, 3, null], [\"branch\", null, null, 1, null], [\"union\", 400000, 500000, 5, 5], [\"attributes\", 400000, 500000, 6, null]]"],"focus":"large node IDs, long-chain attributes, splitting middle edge, branch immutability and later union in branched timeline"}]}
